title: Senior Software Engineer - Qualcomm India Global Group - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Qualcomm India Global Group - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Qualcomm India Global Group in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Qualcomm India Global Group:
Qualcomm India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India Global Group!
